chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Rev. Appln Nos.187, 188 and 189 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Arbaz Waseem, Advocate for respondents No.1 and 2. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- It appears from perusal of the orders passed by this Court that the applicant in these criminal revision applications has not been present on several dates of hearing since 25.04.2025 which includes 09.07.2025 and 05.08.2025. No intimation is received from him today either. It is now 10:25 a.m. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
